intent: Add a distinct INDETERMINATE (infra_error) gate outcome so a transient GitHub outage (503/timeout) no longer becomes a hard REWORK. The 2026-07-16 incident: during a GitHub outage the ci-evidence step got a 503 and routed to REWORK ('agent's turn — do not merge') on a PR whose code was fine, training humans to merge past REWORKs. This wraps the GitHub API calls the gate makes (PR + check-runs fetches behind ci-evidence) in a bounded exponential-backoff+jitter retry for transient failures (5xx/429/network), never retrying real 4xx (401/403/404), and on retry-exhaustion emits INDETERMINATE — a new terminal outcome distinct from PASS/REWORK/REVIEW that blocks auto-merge (non-zero exit) but is worded as 'could not evaluate, re-run when GitHub recovers', not an agent-fix REWORK or a PASS.

validation_plan.reason: TypeScript type-check must pass; the new GateOutcome type and the INDETERMINATE table entry must be sound across cli/verdict/github/types.
tsc build must succeed so the test suite (which runs against dist/test) is exercising the new code.

Full unit suite including the new infra-error-retry tests (transient 5xx/429/network retried then INDETERMINATE; 403/404 not retried; healthy response = normal verdict) and the INDETERMINATE surface tests. Corroborated by the real CI 'test' check-run via ci_evidence_checks.
Rebuild dist/index.js (the Action runs the bundle); dist-check requires it be up to date with src.
Local plumb shape pre-flight (shape + diff_sha256) must PASS before pushing — the gate gates the gate.

execution_evidence.output_ref: esbuild -> dist/index.js 273.8kb, Done; re-bundle produces no further diff (dist-check clean)
shape pre-flight PASS — shape + diff_sha256 OK

result_summary: Added the INDETERMINATE (infra_error) terminal outcome and bounded retry for transient GitHub failures. github.ts: new githubFetch() retry wrapper (4 attempts, exp backoff + jitter) retrying 5xx/429/network but never 401/403/404, and an InfraError class; getPrHeadSha/getCheckRunsForSha now route through it; renderComment/renderCiSummary render the infra-error surface. types.ts: new GateOutcome = Verdict | 'indeterminate'; GateResult.final widened. verdict.ts: INDETERMINATE row in the presentation TABLE (distinct 🔌 icon, check name, action_required conclusion, 'not a code verdict / re-run when GitHub recovers' wording, mergeable:false). cli.ts: ci-evidence catch distinguishes InfraError (→ gate.final=indeterminate, skip semantic review) from real errors (→ existing severity handling); exit code stays non-zero for indeterminate so auto-merge is blocked. Verified: npm run check/build/test (292 pass, incl. new infra-error-retry.test.ts + INDETERMINATE surface tests) and npm run bundle all green; phase logic and shape/semantic/ci-evidence LOGIC unchanged. self_modifying:true — touches protected paths src/github.ts and src/types.ts.
